---
title: "lookup_language"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_language()`

Lookup Language IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_language(language_name)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `language_name` | Character vector. Language names or '"*"' for all. |

## Value

An integer vector of IDs.

## Description

Resolves language names to internal FlixPatrol IDs.
